headline: Co-Founder, Product at Upside, building revenue intelligence for B2B go-to-market teams
title: Co-Founder, Product
confidenceNote: Exact-name primary profiles and event listings match Alex Bauer as Co-Founder, Product at Upside in San Francisco, with prior product and marketing roles at Branch.
bioMarkdown: Alex is Co-Founder, Product at Upside, a revenue-intelligence company helping B2B teams understand which marketing, sales, partnerships, and customer-success actions influence deals. He is a strong match for conversations on enterprise GTM, attribution beyond last-touch metrics, product positioning, and practical AI use in revenue operations.

headline: Block engineer building open-source AI agent infrastructure around Goose and MCP
